prompt: Hiroshige ukiyo-e woodblock print, Edo period Japan. Lone traveler descending steep mountain path toward lowest valley. Solid flat color fills — indigo blue, pale ochre, cream white, dark pine green. Thick bold black ink outlines around every shape. Flat graphic forms with zero shading or gradients. Woodgrain texture visible across printed color areas. Mountain layers shown as flat overlapping silhouettes, not atmospheric haze. Purely graphic and flat like a printed woodblock. Traditional Japanese decorative border. No Western perspective, no mist, no photorealistic rendering.
tradition_approach: Hiroshige compositional diagonals, flat unmodulated color areas in indigo/ochre/cream, bold ink outlines, stylized pine silhouettes, horizontal cloud bands, visible woodgrain texture across color fields.
